author.bio: My book, ULTRALEARNING, is out now: https://www.scotthyoung.com/blog/ultralearning/
author.name: Scott Young

content.text:
Some things society deems lazy but are actually productive:

- Long walks just to think.
- Taking naps when you're tired.
- Quitting jobs early when it's not a good fit.
- Extended conversations with colleagues.
- Daydreaming.

What else am I missing?
